reviewer.name: Anthony
reviewer.notes: Approved by Anthony for customer delivery after Rubric v1 draft migration, red-team copy correction, customer-preview review, and safety checks. Public sharing and logo authorization remain separate from this delivery approval.

indicators.label: Business identity
indicators.evidence: The homepage title, logo alt text, schema Organization node, and footer identify A to Z Sleep Solutions.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Primary offer
indicators.evidence: The Services page is titled sleep training packages and describes customized sleep solutions by email, phone, and in-home support.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Intended audience
indicators.evidence: The homepage speaks directly to parents with babies, toddlers, newborns, bedtime struggles, naps, and sleep routines.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Geography and service area
indicators.evidence: The homepage references Arizona top in-home sleep specialists and the Services page lists Arizona and Cape Cod for in-home packages, but the audit did not find a structured address or verified city.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because service geography is visible for some offers but local identity is incomplete.

indicators.label: Contact path or CTA
indicators.evidence: Navigation and page sections expose schedule/free consult CTAs, contact links, phone number 602-842-2055, and email.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Cross-page consistency
indicators.evidence: Business name, phone, and sleep-consulting offer are consistent across reviewed pages; location language is less consistent because city/address were not confirmed in structured data.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 75% anchor applies because the core offer is consistent while local service-area clarity remains incomplete.

indicators.label: Crawl access
indicators.evidence: The retained audit fetched homepage, About, Contact, and Services pages successfully and found index/follow robots meta on the homepage.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Indexability and metadata
indicators.evidence: Reviewed pages include page titles, canonical WordPress/Yoast schema graph records, and homepage index/follow robots metadata.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Identity and location consistency
indicators.evidence: The name and phone are clear, but the retained location vetting returned low confidence with no verified city or address from JSON-LD or scanned page text.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because identity is clear but location consistency is not fully verified.

indicators.label: Appropriate local business schema
indicators.evidence: The current JSON-LD contains WebPage, WebSite, Organization, BreadcrumbList, ImageObject, and actions, but no LocalBusiness or Service entity for the actual consulting offer.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Service-page coverage
indicators.evidence: The Services page was fetched and contains detailed sections for email, phone, in-home, overnight, weekend, and platinum sleep solutions.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Internal linking and discovery
indicators.evidence: Homepage navigation and CTAs link to Services, Contact, About, testimonials, classes, and package booking paths.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Entity and schema specificity
indicators.evidence: Organization/WebSite/WebPage schema exists, but it does not define the business as a local/service provider or connect Hannah, service areas, and offerings as first-class entities.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because generic entity schema exists but business-specific schema is incomplete.

indicators.label: Structured services
indicators.evidence: The Services page describes multiple packages, prices, support windows, and delivery modes, but those services are not represented as Service/Offer structured data.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Answer-ready content
indicators.evidence: The Services page answers concrete buyer questions around delivery mode, process, pricing, duration, support type, and who delivers the service.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Factual consistency
indicators.evidence: Core facts are consistent, but location remains ambiguous across machine-readable and visible sources in the retained audit.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 75% anchor applies because the offer facts are consistent while the local facts need cleanup.

indicators.label: Authorship and provenance
indicators.evidence: The site identifies Hannah as founder/owner, mom of seven, pediatric nurse, and certified sensitive sleep consultant, but schema does not connect that person/entity relationship.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 75% anchor applies because visible provenance exists but machine-readable provenance is thin.

indicators.label: Machine accessibility
indicators.evidence: The retained pages are readable HTML with extractable text, links, metadata, and JSON-LD.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Verifiable contact and location
indicators.evidence: Phone and email are visible, but no verified street address or city was found in the retained location-vetting pass.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because contact exists while local verification is incomplete.

indicators.label: People and credentials
indicators.evidence: The homepage identifies Hannah as founder/owner, mom of seven, pediatric nurse, and certified sensitive sleep consultant.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Reviews and testimonials
indicators.evidence: The homepage includes multiple named testimonials and links to read more testimonials, plus an embedded review video.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Outcomes and examples
indicators.evidence: Testimonials describe specific outcomes such as independent sleep, longer naps, and sleeping through the night, but these are testimonial claims rather than structured case examples.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 75% anchor applies because outcomes are present but not organized as case studies or service proof blocks.

indicators.label: Affiliations and awards
indicators.evidence: Visible credentials are present for Hannah, but retained artifacts did not confirm independent affiliations, awards, or third-party professional memberships.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because professional credentials exist while affiliations/awards are not independently established.

indicators.label: Process and policies
indicators.evidence: Service pages explain questionnaires, personalized assessments, implementation support, follow-up windows, calls, texts, emails, app support, and fair-use support language.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Third-party corroboration
indicators.evidence: The schema links to Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube profiles and the site embeds social/review assets, but this draft did not independently verify those external profiles.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because external profile links exist but independent corroboration remains pending.

indicators.label: Core services
indicators.evidence: The Services page covers email, phone, in-home, overnight, weekend, platinum, and newborn/dual-start sleep support offerings.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Decision questions
indicators.evidence: The page helps buyers compare service mode, support level, price, duration, who delivers the service, and whether in-home is available.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Process and next steps
indicators.evidence: The reviewed content explains free consult, questionnaire, personalized assessment, implementation support, follow-up, and package booking CTAs.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Cost, financing, or insurance
indicators.evidence: The Services page lists package prices from phone support through in-home and premium founder-led options.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Geography
indicators.evidence: The content names Arizona and Cape Cod for in-home service and general remote support elsewhere, but city/address/service-area structure remains unclear.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 50% anchor applies because geography appears in service copy but is not consistently structured.

indicators.label: Audience and scenarios
indicators.evidence: The site covers newborns, babies, toddlers, naps, bedtime, complex sleep challenges, Down syndrome/ADHD imagery, and different family support scenarios.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping

indicators.label: Ownership and recency
indicators.evidence: Homepage schema shows a 2026 modified date and names Hannah as owner/founder, but About schema appears older and recency is not uniformly clear across pages.
indicators.collection_method: retained artifact review + manual rubric mapping
indicators.reviewer_note: The 75% anchor applies because there is some recent metadata but not consistent freshness across every key page.
